name: Pho (Beef Noodle Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the stewing beef, veal bones, onions, garlic, water, salt, and white pepper in a large pot. Cook over medium heat for 2 hours.
2. Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into another container, discarding the solids.
3. Stir in the anchovy paste and vinegar.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, egg, and water until well combined to form a smooth batter.
5. Using a sifter or colander with small holes, gently pour the batter through the holes into the boiling broth. Cook for 10 minutes or until the noodles are tender.
6. Shred the beef into thin strips using tongs.
7. Serve the pho hot, garnished as desired, over rice noodles. Serves 8-10 people.
